channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: High Court Blocks US Ebola Facility Construction at Laikipia Base

item.description: The High Court has issued conservatory orders halting the construction of a US funded Ebola isolation site at Laikipia Air Base pending further review.
